permissions.disclosure: Used to store local extension state such as safe UI preferences and local connection state.
Used to display the NODAL OS companion interface in Chrome side panel.
Used for local extension scheduling and periodic health checks.
Retained for extension UI coordination and future user-approved flows; no broad website auto-access is enabled by default.
Retained for future user-approved flows; the public build does not auto-inject content scripts into external websites.
Limited to http://127.0.0.1/* and http://localhost/* so the extension can communicate with the local NODAL OS bridge.
